# WhisperShortcut 7.48

## Installation

Download the latest `WhisperShortcut.app` from the [releases page](https://github.com/mgsgde/whisper-shortcut/releases), move it to your Applications folder, and launch it.

## What's New

### Your Glossary is followed more reliably

- **Dictation now sticks to your Glossary spellings far more consistently.** The app now gives the transcription model an explicit instruction to use the exact spelling and capitalization of the terms you list, instead of just passing a bare word list. This fixes cases where a name kept getting replaced by a more common, similar-sounding word — for example "Claude" heard as "Cloud".
- Tip: write each Glossary term the way you want it to appear (e.g. **Claude**, not "claude").

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mgsgde/whisper-shortcut/compare/v7.47...v7.48
